title: Phase 2A: Database schema - support models (PO, Collections, CRM, Import, Attachments) + migration
description: Add remaining models: PurchaseOrder, PurchaseOrderLine, VendorInvoice, MatchException, VendorClaim; Quote, QuoteLine; CollectionAccount, CollectionActivity, PromiseToPay, Dispute, PaymentPlan; Lead, Estimate, EstimateLine; ImportJob, ImportChange; Attachment, CommunicationLog, NotificationTemplate. Run migration and update seed.
steps: Add MatchException and VendorClaim models for three-way match
Add Quote, QuoteLine models for pricing quotes
Add CollectionAccount, CollectionActivity, PromiseToPay, Dispute, PaymentPlan models
Add Lead, Estimate, EstimateLine models for CRM
Add ImportJob, ImportChange models for bridge/import engine
Run prisma migrate dev for business models migration
Update prisma/seed.ts with sample business data (customers, products, vendors)
